chunks.text: Form No: HCJD/C-121 ORDER SHEET IN THE LAHORE HIGH COURT LAHORE (JUDICIAL DEPARTMENT) Case No. Writ Petition No.67011/2021 Sh. Irfan Raza Versus Province of Punjab, etc. Sr.No.of order/ Proceedings Date of order/ Proceedings Order with signatures of Judge, and that of parties or counsel, where necessary. 28.10.2021 Mr. Muhammad Kabir Khan, Advocate for petitioner. ====== By way of this petition under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, the petitioner seeks direction to respondents No.2 & 3 for decision of his application moved before them within the stipulated time. 2. Heard. Learned counsel for the petitioner has not been able to show as to why sought for writ of mandamus be issued. Mandamus is not writ of right it is not consequently granted ofcourse but the Court exercises this discretion only if it is convinced that the petitioner has come to the Court with clean hands and for just cause. Apparently the petitioner has his own axe to grind behind the scene and by means of filing this writ petition he has made an abortive attempt to use the authority of this Court as a tool to reach at his desired goal. 3. Contents of application, whose decision the petitioner desired contains ambiguous and general nature of allegations against various officials/ officers against Canal Department without any substantive material. If the petitioner has any proof qua the illegality of the officials he may approach high ups of the said department. Apparently, the petitioner is trying to use the shoulder of this Court to harass and blackmail the public functionaries. If W.P. No.67011/2021 | 2 this practice is allowed then every person who has personal grudge against the public functionaries will resort to Anti Corruption Department by levelling allegations of general nature against the public functionaries just to settle his score.

If W.P. No.67011/2021 | 2 this practice is allowed then every person who has personal grudge against the public functionaries will resort to Anti Corruption Department by levelling allegations of general nature against the public functionaries just to settle his score. The application from the face of record is misconceived. The same stands dismissed in-limine. (Asjad Javaid Ghural) Judge Approved for Reporting Judge Azam *
